description.en: A right-spin Balance Type Ratchet from the Basic Line. It features nine blades, six of which barely protrude to increase burst resistance, while three larger blades can align with Blade contact points for attack potential.
description.de: Ein rechtsdrehender Balance-Typ-Ratchet aus der Basic Line. Er verfügt über nine blades, six of which barely protrude to increase burst resistance, while three larger blades can align with Blade contact points for attack potential.

assessment.en: 9-60 is a versatile Ratchet with excellent burst resistance due to its mostly recessed blades. Weight: 6.1g. Ratings based on community data.

description.en: A right-spin Balance Type Ratchet from the Basic Line with a medium 7mm height. Its four blades provide a balanced mix of attack, defense and stamina.
description.de: Ein rechtsdrehender Balance-Typ Ratchet from the Basic Line mit einer mittleren 7-mm-Höhe. Its four blades provide a balanced mix of attack, defense and stamina.

assessment.de: 4-70 offers a balanced stat spread and a medium height that works well in various combo types. Gewicht: 6.5g. Ratings based on community data.

description.en: A right-spin Attack Type Ratchet from the Unique Line with a tall 8mm height. It features a single large protrusion for attack potential but is more exposed to strikes from below.

assessment.en: 1-80 trades the low profile of 1-60 for stronger locks and more stamina, making it useful in tall attack or balance combos. Weight: 6.0g. Ratings based on community data.

description.en: A right-spin Defense Type Ratchet from the Unique Line. It features seven blades with only one large protrusion, giving it a heavy, circular profile suited for defense and stamina.

description.en: Integrated Ratchet built into the Blade for Expand Blade / Infinity system Beys. It is not a separate part and exists only to represent combos such as BulletGriffon and GloryValkyrie structurally.
description.de: Integrierter Ratchet, der in den Blade für Expand-Blade-/Infinity-System-Beys eingebaut ist. Es ist kein separates Teil und dient nur dazu, Kombos wie BulletGriffon und GloryValkyrie strukturell abzubilden.

assessment.en: The Integrated Ratchet is part of the Expand Blade (Infinity) Blade itself and has no independent weight or stats. It should not be used for rating calculations.

description.en: A right-spin Defense Type Ratchet from the Custom Line. It features a metal ring, making it the heaviest Ratchet at around 10.6g, and is used in combos such as GolemRock M-85HN.

assessment.en: M-85 is the heaviest Ratchet available, providing massive weight for defensive stability. Its metal ring increases burst resistance and overall bulk, but detailed official stat distribution is not yet documented. Weight: 10.6g. Ratings estimated from type, weight and shape.
